label.description: The field label displayed in the edit screen

type.description: Field type identifier. Must be "accordion" for this field type.

name.description: The field name used to save/load data. Auto-generated from label if not provided.

key.description: Unique field key. Auto-generated if not provided.

instructions.description: Instructions displayed to editors below the field label

conditional_logic.description: Conditional logic rules. Set to false to disable, or provide rules array.

open.description: Display this accordion as open on page load

multi_expand.description: Allow this accordion to open without closing others

endpoint.description: Define an endpoint for the previous accordion to stop. This accordion will not be visible.
